overall.description: A nighttime cable car journey through a futuristic cyberpunk metropolis, featuring neon-lit skyscrapers, holographic advertisements, and dense urban architecture. The footage from Cyberpunk 2077 shows a smooth elevated transit ride with atmospheric haze and vibrant artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated cable car transit through neon commercial district

events.description: digital billboard on curved glass tower changes advertisement content
cable car begins gradual leftward curve along elevated track

agents.ego_description: observing the illuminated cityscape from the cable car window while moving above the multi-lane highway

notable_agents.action: cars traveling along the highway below the cable car track

entered.detail: dark metal window frame of the cable car interior visible throughout the shot
modern cylindrical building with large digital billboard displays
illuminated advertisement screen showing changing commercial content
elevated road with multiple lanes of traffic visible below the cable car
distant cluster of skyscrapers with various neon signage

segments.scene_description: The segment opens from inside a cable car moving through a dense cyberpunk commercial district. A curved glass tower with changing digital billboards dominates the left side while traffic moves along the multi-lane highway below. The atmosphere is hazy with vibrant neon illumination from the surrounding advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated transit overlooking urban plaza and highway interchange

events.description: view opens from enclosed commercial street to wide urban plaza and highway interchange
vehicles merge on the elevated highway ramp visible below

agents.ego_description: continuing along the cable car route with expanded panoramic view of the urban plaza and distant skyline

entered.detail: large open dark area with sparse vegetation visible to the left of the track
curved highway interchange with merging traffic lanes
distinctive building with illuminated dome visible in the middle distance

segments.scene_description: The cable car emerges from the dense commercial corridor into a more open vista overlooking a large urban plaza. An elevated highway interchange becomes visible below while a distinctive domed building appears on the right. The view expands to show the broader neon-lit skyline in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense cyberpunk commercial canyon with holographic advertisements

events.description: passing close to domed building with distinctive illuminated architecture
increased neon illumination from surrounding holographic billboards and signage

agents.ego_description: traversing the dense commercial district surrounded by towering structures with prominent neon and holographic displays

entered.detail: tall structure displaying large-scale holographic commercial advertisements
dense cluster of illuminated office towers with various corporate signage
tall building featuring prominent vertical neon light strips

segments.scene_description: The cable car moves through a dense urban canyon of cyberpunk architecture, passing close to the domed building. Holographic advertisements and vertical neon signage illuminate the scene from all sides as the vehicle continues along the elevated track.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial transit corridor with KENDACHI manufacturing complex

events.description: large illuminated KENDACHI corporate sign becomes visible on industrial building facade
entering darker covered section of the elevated track with concrete infrastructure

agents.ego_description: descending slightly as the cable car passes the industrial sector and enters a covered track section with visible support structures

entered.detail: large industrial building with prominent illuminated KENDACHI signage
massive concrete support columns for the elevated track structure
dark covered section of the transit line with overhead infrastructure

segments.scene_description: The final segment features the cable car passing the KENDACHI industrial complex with its prominent illuminated signage. The environment transitions to a darker, more industrial setting with visible concrete support pillars as the track enters a covered section, concluding the journey through the cyberpunk cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous cable car journey that transitions from a vibrant commercial district into a dark, industrial urban corridor. It begins inside the vehicle moving past a curved glass tower with shifting digital billboards and a hazy, neon-lit highway below. As the cable car emerges from the dense corridor, the view expands into an open vista overlooking a large urban plaza and a distant skyline, before shifting toward a distinctive domed building. The scene then tightens into a dense urban canyon filled with holographic advertisements and vertical signage that illuminate the path from all sides. Finally, the environment turns toward the KENDACHI industrial complex, where the vibrant lights fade into a darker setting of concrete pillars as the track enters a covered section.
